description:
Evaluate Benzene, Acetone, Dimethyl Sulfoxide, Methylene Chloride, and Acetophenone on CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) to find a safer substitute for a cleaning process. Screen each solvent against three criteria:
1. Fire Safety: Flash Point must be > 140°F (60°C) OR Non-flammable.
2. Process Efficiency: Water Solubility must be 'Soluble', 'Very soluble', 'Miscible', or 'Complete'.
3. Health Safety: Must NOT be listed as a known or suspected 'carcinogen' or cause 'cancer' in the Hazards sections.

Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/solvent_screening_matrix.txt listing the Flash Point, Water Solubility
